name: Can I sue my employer directly for occupational illness instead of workers comp?
description: No, comp exclusive unless intentional; stick to claim[1].

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer directly for occupational illness instead of workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp exclusive unless intentional; stick to claim[1].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Rarely; workers comp is exclusive remedy unless intentional tort.

Limits third-party suits; employer immunity for negligence[1].

- Exceptions: deliberate harm.
- Product liability separate.
- Higher proof threshold.

Comp first; lawyer assesses suits.
